Alphonse Marie Mucha

Sarah Bernhardt
by Alphonse Marie Mucha

Zodiaque ("La Plume")
by Alphonse Marie Mucha
Czech Republic · 1896–1897 · Color lithograph from multiple stones on tan wove paper

by Alphonse Marie Mucha
Czech Republic · 1897 · Color lithograph on paper
La Samaritaine
by Alphonse Marie Mucha
Czech Republic · 1897 · Color lithograph from multiple stones on paper
